title: Code Interview Practice Site
subtitle: Static code-focused interview practice from Python basics to advanced backend, automation, AI/ML, and system design implementation questions.

ladders.name: Code Foundations
ladders.summary: Python syntax, collections, files, JSON, testing, and basic automation coding habits.

ladders.name: Implementation and APIs
ladders.summary: APIs, retries, async, databases, ORM tradeoffs, automation pipelines, and debugging.

ladders.name: Architecture and AI Systems
ladders.summary: Scaling, observability, distributed systems, AI pipelines, retrieval, and production tradeoffs.

topic_catalog.title: Language and Data Structures
topic_catalog.summary: Questions about Python core behavior, traps, identity vs equality, mutability, and efficient use of collections.

topic_catalog.title: Scripts and File Pipelines
topic_catalog.summary: Practical code questions around dry-run, file I/O, batch processing, idempotency, and scheduling safety.

topic_catalog.title: HTTP, Databases, and ORM
topic_catalog.summary: Code-focused backend questions around timeouts, retries, transactions, query shaping, and caching.

topic_catalog.title: AI and Machine Learning Code Paths
topic_catalog.summary: Applied questions about evaluation, leakage, embeddings, prompt templates, RAG, and model-serving tradeoffs.

topic_catalog.title: Distributed and Production Patterns
topic_catalog.summary: Implementation-heavy questions on queues, idempotency, retries, observability, and delivery safety.

practice_sets.name: Basic Master Set
practice_sets.summary: Large all-in-one foundation bank with more than 100 questions.

practice_sets.name: Intermediate Master Set
practice_sets.summary: Large implementation bank for APIs, async, databases, optimization, and data flow.

practice_sets.name: Advanced Master Set
practice_sets.summary: Large advanced bank for distributed systems, AI systems, resilience, and operations.

practice_sets.name: Automation Set
practice_sets.summary: Code questions about scripting, scheduling, file pipelines, retries, and safety.

practice_sets.name: Backend and Data Set
practice_sets.summary: Code questions for APIs, persistence, ORM behavior, caching, and query design.

practice_sets.name: AI and Machine Learning Set
practice_sets.summary: Applied AI/ML code and reasoning questions for evaluation, retrieval, prompts, and serving tradeoffs.

practice_sets.name: System Design Set
practice_sets.summary: Production code and architecture questions around queues, scaling, reliability, and delivery behavior.

project_ideas.name: Static Code Quiz Engine
project_ideas.summary: A JSON-driven static site that turns code questions into a scored quiz without a backend.
project_ideas.why: Shows how to model content, scoring, and search entirely on GitHub Pages.

project_ideas.name: Automation Drill Lab
project_ideas.summary: A collection of tiny scripts and question sets around files, APIs, retries, and schedules.
project_ideas.why: Useful for practical coding interviews that ask for scripts and operational reasoning.

preparation_notes.title: Practice by writing and comparing code
preparation_notes.note: Code interviews improve faster when you compare multiple implementations and explain which one is safer or faster.

preparation_notes.title: Focus on bottlenecks, not only syntax
preparation_notes.note: A strong answer identifies whether the real cost is in loops, I/O, queries, network calls, or external dependencies.

preparation_notes.title: Treat failure paths as first-class
preparation_notes.note: Real code quality is often revealed by retries, validation, cleanup, and edge cases rather than the happy path.
